name: Indonesian Soda Bread
recipeInstructions:
Soda Bread: This bread, which many consider the Irish soda bread, is usually served at high teas and other important occasions.
1. Sift flour, sugar, salt, and baking soda into a large bowl.
2. Stir in currants to coat with flour.
3. Stir in buttermilk just until the flour is moistened.
4. Knead dough in the bowl with lightly floured hands, 10 times.
5. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured cookie sheet and shape into an 8-inch round.
6. Cut a cross into the top with a floured knife.
7. Bake in a hot oven (400 degrees) for 40 minutes, until the loaf turns golden and gives a hollow sound when tapped.
8. Cool completely before slicing.
